NAME: Bachoco - Plant 2 - Action Plan
DESCRIPTION: GMP, Release on time, no chicken, no positives  This project addresses structural, procedural, behavioral, and environmental risks identified across clean room operations, infrastructure, sanitation processes, GMP compliance, and environmental monitoring systems. Initial assessment revealed a combination of:     Open infrastructure risks (penetrations, caulking, drain integrity)     Inconsistent sanitation execution     Environmental monitoring gaps     GMP compliance variability     Training system deficiencies     Backlog of legacy corrective actions To stabilize operations and reduce contamination and compliance risk, the strategy is organized into seven structured workstreams:     Clean Room Controls Stabilization     Infrastructure Integrity Restoration     GMP & Behavioral Compliance Reinforcement     Environmental Monitoring Optimization     Sanitation Process Standardization     Training & Competency System Strengthening     Backlog Elimination Progress is tracked at both task-level execution and milestone-level stabilization to ensure systemic risk reduction rather than isolated task closure. The objective is to transition from reactive corrective actions to a controlled, standardized, and auditable operating state across all high-risk areas.

NAME: Perry Harvest - Action Plan - Jan-Mar
DESCRIPTION: Perry Harvest action plan triggered by being below Perdue KPI metrics for overall KPI and QA Preop Pass Rate
LATEST STATUS UPDATE: '----------------------------------------  Summary  The Preop Pass Rate Improvement Action Plan has been successfully completed, achieving the primary goal of improving the Preop Pass Rate to above 92%. The project spanned approximately three months (January through March 2026), implementing a comprehensive four-strategy approach including Gap Analysis, Process Changes, Metric Reporting, and Admin Updates.   **With the action plan complete, ownership of maintaining and continuous improvement will now transfer to the local and operations management team led by @Mario Colindres  and @Randall Barbee.  **The team will utilize the QSI and Perdue portals for ongoing data tracking and KPI monitoring to sustain performance gains and drive further improvements.  Key accomplishments include:     Completed all 38 action plan tasks across four strategic areas with 100% completion rate     Successfully implemented ✓ Operations Management Changes with new Area Manager Mario Colindres and Site Manager Jerome Lockhart     Established robust metric tracking systems including ✓ Provide access to Perdue Portal to Management Team completed March 15, 2026     Implemented critical process improvements such as ✓ Develop Belt Rotation Program and ✓ Drain Management Verification of MSS w/Pictures     Enhanced communication protocols through ✓ Improvement of Communication of Program Changes with QA/USDA to rebuild trust with quality oversight teams  ----------------------------------------  Action Plan Tracking  The project successfully addressed systemic issues identified in Areas 3 and 6, which were the main contributors to preop failures over the previous 18 months.  Strategy completion highlights:     Gap Analysis (12 tasks completed): Comprehensive assessments including ✓ Food Safety Assessment #2 and ✓ Operations Management Assessment #2 validated improvements, with ✓ Dry Pickup Time Impact Review with Production and ✓ Verify Foam Concentration and Application Dwell Time  addressing critical cleaning process gaps     Process Changes (14 tasks completed): Implemented transformative changes including ✓ First Rinse Pre-Foam Inspection for Debone and DSI areas, ✓ Detergent Application Correct Coverage w/Employees by Area, and ✓ Implement W/E preop forms to Food Safety completed February 26, 2026     Metric Reporting (8 tasks completed): Established comprehensive tracking systems including ✓ Track Self Inspection Improvement w/QSI Major Findings Rates and ✓ Track Hand Scrubbing Implementation w/Minor Findings & ATP, with ✓ Last 6 Week of QSI Portal Data - Perry Harvest  completed March 14, 2026     Admin Updates (3 tasks completed): Finalized administrative infrastructure including ✓ Update Chemical Concentration & Dwell Time and ✓ Update Chemical Titration Logs to support sustained performance  ----------------------------------------
